title: [Task Sprint] QA Testing Report — Villume Admin

issues.main_description_html:
Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Settings

Rebuild profile-setting.component on the new design system; keep existing logic (username availability/reserved-route check).

Scope: avatar upload (JPG/PNG/WebP ≤5MB), first/last name, Username with live villume.com/<slug> preview, Artistic medium, About, Location, Email, Website, Facebook, Instagram, "visible to anyone" note, and an explicit save status ("All changes saved").

Defect fix: the label currently reads "First name df" — remove the stray "df".

Acceptance: all fields render + save; status shown; typo fixed; dark mode + responsive.

Depends on: _Add Settings Styles To dashboard.scss.

Part of the Settings & Password-Recovery redesign (Frontend).
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/ui-setting-email-password/plan.md · brainstorming.md

Demo by Developer

2026-06-09.17-55-02.mp4

QA Tester Summary — Issue #1646: Redesign Profile Settings Form

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/settings/issue_1646_profile_settings_form.spec.ts (Playwright · Chromium)
Env: Dev production https://dev.villume.com
Account: testergothru@gmail.com
Result: ❌ Failed — avatar upload constraint does not match task acceptance

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given → Expected Matrix Result
1 White profile_form_fields Open /settings/profile → avatar, names, username, medium, about, location, email, website, Facebook, Instagram render TP ✅ Pass
2 White first_name_typo Profile form label renders → no stray df in First name TP ✅ Pass
3 Gray username_preview_reserved_route Type username → preview updates; reserved route blocks save TP ✅ Pass
4 Gray save_status Submit profile form → PUT /v1/users/profile succeeds and All changes saved appears TP ✅ Pass
5 Black avatar_constraints Avatar upload supports JPG/PNG/WebP ≤5MB TP ❌ Fail
6 Black dark_responsive Dark mode + 390px mobile viewport → no horizontal overflow TP ✅ Pass
7 Task Sprint #1646 acceptance All fields + save + status + typo fixed + dark/responsive + avatar constraints TP ❌ Fail

Backend / Response Code & Review

Flow Endpoint / Route Method Status Review
Login tester account /v1/auth POST 2xx ✅ Authenticated account menu visible
Open profile settings /settings/profile GET 200 ✅ Form rendered on dev production
Save profile settings /v1/users/profile PUT < 300 ✅ Save completed and status appeared
Username reserved-route check UI route config DOM/runtime N/A ✅ settings username shows Username cannot be used and disables save

Code Review

Area File Finding Impact
First name typo src/app/pages/settings/profile-setting/profile-setting.component.html Label is First name; no df found ✅ Verified
Avatar accept attribute src/app/pages/settings/profile-setting/profile-setting.component.html File input accepts image/png,image/jpeg,image/webp ✅ UI picker includes WebP
Avatar helper text src/app/pages/settings/profile-setting/profile-setting.component.html Text says up to 2 MB; task says ≤5MB ❌ Mismatch
Avatar validation src/app/pages/settings/profile-setting/profile-setting.component.ts allowedExtention = ['png', 'jpeg', 'jpg']; WebP is not allowed ❌ WebP acceptance not implemented
Avatar max size src/app/pages/settings/profile-setting/profile-setting.component.ts Validator uses file.size / 1024 / 1024 <= 2 ❌ Max size is 2MB, not 5MB
Save status src/app/pages/settings/profile-setting/profile-setting.component.html All changes saved. status renders after successful save ✅ Verified

Bug Notes

  • Acceptance requires avatar upload JPG/PNG/WebP ≤5MB.
  • Actual UI helper text says JPG, PNG or WebP · up to 2 MB · square works best.
  • Actual validator only allows png, jpeg, jpg; WebP upload would be rejected even though the input accept attribute includes WebP.
  • Actual validator and warning message enforce 2MB, not 5MB.
  • Because avatar constraints are part of the scope, issue #1646 should remain open until WebP and 5MB handling are aligned.

Evidence

  • Screenshots: desktop light, save status, avatar constraint failure, desktop dark, mobile dark.
  • Video: Full desktop recording with browser address bar and 2-second action delay.

Screenshots

Avatar constraint failure:

Profile settings desktop dark:

Profile settings desktop light:

Profile settings mobile dark:

Profile settings save status:

Video Recording

issue-1646-profile-settings-address-bar.mp4

Epic C — 404 (/404)

Wire 404 behavior.

Scope

  • History-aware "Go back" (history.back when available, else home).
  • Recovery chips link to real routes; noindex meta.

Acceptance criteria

  • Go back works; all links resolve to real routes; page is noindex.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Navigate to a bad URL → 404 renders.
  2. "Go back" with history → returns to previous page; without history → home.
  3. Click each recovery chip → correct route.
  4. Check meta robots = noindex.

Demo by Developer

2026-06-05.16-04-44.mp4

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1613: [Integration] 404 (/404) — go-back, recovery links, noindex

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/not-found/issue_1613_404_integration.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Scope: 404 integration behavior on direct route https://dev.villume.com/404: Go back behavior, recovery chip navigation, and robots=noindex.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White direct_404_renders guest opens /404 -> 404 recovery page is visible with validated slicing content TP Pass
2 Gray go_back_browser_history /about -> browser navigation to /404?qa=history -> click Go back -> returns to /about TP Pass
3 Gray go_back_spa_history /about -> Playwright/SPA navigation to /404?qa=spa-history -> click Go back -> returns to /about TP Fail
4 Black go_back_no_history_fallback isolated direct /404?qa=no-history -> click Go back -> lands on home TP Pass
5 Gray recovery_chips_routes each recovery chip from /404 -> route resolves and does not remain on 404 TP Pass
6 Task Sprint robots_noindex /404?qa=noindex -> meta robots contains noindex TP Fail

Frontend Status & Review

Area Review Status
Direct /404 page 404 page renders with .villume-not-found, 404 heading, Back to home, Go back, and recovery chips using the same baseline validated in Issue #1612. Pass
Go back with browser history Starting from /about, using browser navigation into /404?qa=history, then clicking Go back returned to /about. Pass
Go back with SPA-style history Starting from /about, navigating to /404?qa=spa-history, then clicking Go back landed on home / instead of /about. Fail
Go back fallback In an isolated direct /404 page, Go back correctly falls back to home. Pass
Recovery chips Templates, Exhibitions, Tutorials, and Contact chips expose real routes and navigate away from 404. Pass
Robots noindex No meta[name="robots"] content was found on /404; expected noindex. Fail

Response Code & Review

Flow Endpoint / Route Method Status Review
Direct 404 route https://dev.villume.com/404 GET route UI success Direct route renders the 404 recovery component.
Go back browser history /about -> browser navigation to /404?qa=history -> button click UI action UI success Button returned to /about.
Go back SPA-style history /about -> /404?qa=spa-history -> button click UI action UI fail Button landed on / instead of returning to /about.
Go back fallback direct /404?qa=no-history -> button click UI action UI success Button landed on home as expected.
Recovery links /catalogue, /#exhibitions, /tutorials, /contact UI navigation UI success All recovery chip links resolved to real routes and left the 404 page.
Robots noindex /404?qa=noindex DOM meta Missing meta[name="robots"] was absent/null.

Code Review

File Review Status
src/app/app.routes.ts Direct 404 route exists and renders the 404 component. Pass
src/app/pages/not-found/not-found.component.ts goBack() checks document.referrer && history.length > 1; browser navigation with referrer passes, but SPA-style navigation can have history with empty document.referrer, causing fallback to home instead of history.back(). Needs fix
src/app/pages/not-found/not-found.component.html Recovery chips are present and route to /catalogue, /#exhibitions, /tutorials, and /contact. Pass
src/app/shared/seo/seo.service.ts SEO service updates title/description/OG/Twitter meta, but does not set/remove robots meta for the 404 route. Needs fix
qa_testing/tests/e2e/not-found/issue_1613_404_integration.spec.ts Added regression coverage for direct /404, Go back behavior, recovery links, and robots noindex. Added

Evidence

Type File Review
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1613-clear-direct-404-context.png Direct /404 page with context badge and validated 404 content.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1613-clear-go-back-browser-history-before-click.png /404 page before browser-history Go back; previous page /about is stated in the badge.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1613-clear-go-back-browser-history-after-click.png Passing result after browser-history Go back returned to /about.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1613-clear-go-back-spa-history-before-click.png /404 page before SPA-style Go back; expected return /about is stated in the badge.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1613-clear-go-back-spa-history-after-click-fail.png Failed SPA-style Go back result, badge shows landed route / instead of /about.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1613-clear-recovery-chips-on-404.png Recovery chips visible on /404 before navigation.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1613-clear-noindex-missing-on-404.png /404 page with badge showing robots meta actual null / missing, expected noindex.
Video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1613-clear-direct-404-context.mp4 Direct /404 context proof.
Video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1613-clear-go-back-browser-history.mp4 Browser-history Go back pass flow from /404 to /about.
Video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1613-clear-go-back-spa-history-fail.mp4 SPA-style Go back fail flow from /404 to / instead of /about.
Video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1613-clear-recovery-chip-contact.mp4 Recovery chip proof starting from /404 and resolving to /contact.
Video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1613-clear-noindex-missing.mp4 Noindex fail proof on /404.

Bug Notes

  • The arbitrary bad URL check was removed from the main matrix to follow the task/baseline test data from Issue #1612: direct /404.
  • goBack() may need history.length > 1 / app-managed previous URL handling if the intended behavior includes internal SPA history where document.referrer is empty.
  • 404 route needs explicit robots=noindex meta handling, either in Angular SeoService or server/SSR output.

Browser screenshot - light mode:

Browser screenshot - light mode:

404 page - light mode:

404 page - light mode:

404 page - light mode:

404 page - light mode:

issues.display_title: Issue #1575: [QA] Accessibility pass — nav, accordion, carousel, captcha, theme toggle
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: QA & rollout

Accessibility pass on new components.

Scope

  • Nav, accordion (FAQ + contact), carousel, captcha, theme toggle, dropzones.
  • ARIA roles/labels, keyboard operability, focus management, contrast.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Keyboard-only: tab through each page → all interactive elements reachable and operable; visible focus.
  2. Screen reader: nav, accordions, carousel, theme toggle announce correctly.
  3. Run axe/Lighthouse a11y audit → no critical violations.
  4. Check color contrast in both themes meets WCAG AA.

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1575: Accessibility pass - nav, accordion, carousel, captcha, theme toggle

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/accessibility/issue_1575_accessibility_pass.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Env: Dev https://dev.villume.com - viewer/no-login
Date: 2026-06-29

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White public_nav_theme_toggle_a11y guest opens home -> public nav links, focus order, and theme toggle ARIA state are valid TP Pass
2 Gray mobile_nav_keyboard_state mobile viewport + keyboard open/close -> menu reports expanded state, focuses first item, closes with Escape TP Pass
3 Gray home_faq_carousel_a11y guest opens home -> FAQ ARIA relationships and carousel keyboard controls work TP Pass
4 Gray contact_accordion_relationships guest opens contact -> accordion triggers and panels expose ARIA relationships TP Pass
5 White contact_forms_captcha_dropzones guest opens contact forms -> labels, captcha semantics, and dropzone label/input relationships are present TP Pass
6 Task Sprint contrast_light_dark sampled light/dark theme text and controls -> contrast meets WCAG AA thresholds TP Pass
7 Task Sprint attachment_max_size_10mb contact attachment validator -> max upload size must be 10 MB FN Fail

Frontend Status & Review

Flow: / + /contact -> public accessibility components -> contact attachment validator

Area Expected Actual Review
Public nav + theme toggle Accessible names, keyboard focus, aria-pressed state Verified Pass
Mobile nav Keyboard reachable, expanded state updates, Escape closes Verified Pass
FAQ + carousel ARIA relationships and keyboard controls available Verified Pass
Contact forms Labels, captcha fieldset/status, dropzone relationships available Verified Pass
Contrast Sampled light/dark theme elements meet WCAG AA Verified Pass
Help attachment validator Max total attachment size is 10 MB Code still uses const maxFileSizeMB = 100; Fail
Custom attachment validator Max total attachment size is 10 MB Code still uses const maxFileSizeMB = 100; Fail

Bug Notes

  • Attachment max-size validator still uses 100 MB while confirmed expected limit is 10 MB.
  • Files:
    • src/app/pages/contact/contact-help/contact-help.component.ts: const maxFileSizeMB = 100;
    • src/app/pages/contact/contact-custom/contact-custom.component.ts: const maxFileSizeMB = 100;
  • Help UI already says Max 10 MB, so current behavior is inconsistent with the UI and confirmed requirement.
  • Final Playwright assertion confirms Expected: 10, Received: 100 for the Help validator.

Evidence

Screenshots:

  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1575-public-nav-theme.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1575-mobile-nav-closed.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1575-home-faq-carousel.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1575-contact-accordion-relationships.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1575-contact-captcha-dropzones.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1575-contrast-dark-theme.png

issues.display_title: Issue #1564: [Integration] About page (/about) — data-driven team/stats + reveal + CTAs
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: About page /about (integration)

Make About content data-driven and wire interactions.

Scope

  • Team roster + stats from config/i18n (not hard-coded in template).
  • Apply revealOnScroll.
  • Wire CTAs ("Start building free" → signup/getstarted; "Get in touch" → /contact).
  • Route copy through ngx-translate.

Acceptance criteria

  • Team/stats render from data source; CTAs navigate correctly; copy translatable.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Update a team member / stat in the data source → page reflects it without template edits.
  2. Scroll → sections reveal via animation.
  3. Click each CTA → correct destination.
  4. Switch language → About copy translates.

Demo by Developer

2026-06-05.14-40-00.mp4

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1564: About page (/about) - data-driven team/stats + reveal + CTAs

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/about/issue_1564_about_integration.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Env: Dev https://dev.villume.com - viewer/no-login
Date: 2026-06-29
Overall Result: Failed

Dev Confirmation

  • Stats scenario: skipped/accepted by dev confirmation.
  • Language translation scenario: skipped/accepted by dev confirmation.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 Gray about_team_data_source About team data source -> /about renders matching groups, names, roles, and images without template hard-code checks TP Pass
2 N/A about_stats_data_source original issue mentions stats, but dev confirmed skip N/A Skipped - accepted by dev confirmation
3 Black reveal_on_scroll visitor scrolls /about -> reveal targets animate in by receiving visible state TP Pass
4 Task Sprint start_building_free_cta click Start building free -> signup/getstarted handoff opens FN Fail
5 Task Sprint get_in_touch_cta click Get in touch -> /contact opens TP Pass
6 N/A language_switch_about_copy original issue mentions language switch, but dev confirmed skip N/A Skipped - accepted by dev confirmation

Frontend Status & Review

Flow: /about -> data-driven team roster -> reveal on scroll -> closing CTAs

Area Expected Actual Review
Team roster Team groups/members render from data source ABOUT_TEAM_GROUPS renders 3 groups, 13 members, 2 co-founder badges, roles, and image alt text correctly on /about Pass
Stats Stats render from source/config Skipped/accepted after dev confirmation Skipped
Reveal on scroll Sections reveal while visitor scrolls Team/closing reveal targets receive visible in state after scrolling into view Pass
Start building free CTA CTA opens signup/getstarted destination or sign-up handoff Clicking Start building free navigates to Home /, but no Create your account sign-up handoff/modal appears Fail
Get in touch CTA CTA routes to /contact Clicking Get in touch routes to /contact and Contact page renders Pass
Language switch About copy translates Skipped/accepted after dev confirmation Skipped

Bug Notes

  • Confirmed acceptance failure: About closing CTA Start building free does not open the expected signup/getstarted handoff.
  • Expected: visitor clicks Start building free on /about and lands on signup/getstarted or sees the Create your account handoff.
  • Actual: click routes to Home /, and no Create your account modal/handoff appears.
  • Get in touch CTA is working and routes correctly to /contact.
  • Stats and language translation are not reported as bugs because dev confirmed those scenarios should be skipped.

Evidence

Screenshots:

  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1564-about-team-data-source.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1564-about-reveal-scroll.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1564-about-cta-start-building-result.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1564-about-cta-contact.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1564-about-language-skip-confirmed.png

Video:

  • Playwright video generated for failed Start building free CTA scenario.

Command:

npx.cmd playwright test tests/e2e/about/issue_1564_about_integration.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts

Result:

1 failed, 4 passed

Screenshots

Get in touch CTA routes to /contact:

Start building free CTA result: no sign-up/getstarted handoff appears:

Language scenario skipped/accepted by dev confirmation:

Reveal on scroll passes on About sections:

Team roster renders from data source:

Epic C — Terms (/term-of-service)

Wire Terms content + TOC.

Scope

  • Source legal content from existing copy/i18n (not the prototype placeholder).
  • Attach the SSR-safe scroll-spy directive; back-to-top + contact callout link.

Acceptance criteria

  • Real Terms content renders; TOC scroll-spy + anchors work; translatable.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Scroll → TOC highlights current section; click → jumps to it.
  2. "Back to top" works; "Contact us" → /contact.
  3. Switch language → content translates (if localized).

Demo by Developer

2026-06-05.16-08-15.mp4

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1615: Terms TOC Content + Scroll-Spy

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/legal/issue_1615_terms_toc_all_sections.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium) and qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1615-dev-flow.cjs (headed screenshot + address-bar video evidence)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com/term-of-service
Account: Guest flow; no login required

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White terms_content_renders open /term-of-service -> real Terms content renders with hero and legal document Desktop light Pass
2 White toc_structure page loaded -> TOC has 8 items and document has 8 matching sections Desktop light Pass
3 Black toc_navigation_all_sections click each TOC item -> matching section scrolls into viewport and active state updates Desktop light Pass
4 Black back_to_top click back-to-top after section navigation -> page returns to Terms hero Desktop light Pass
5 Black contact_cta click Contact us callout -> browser navigates to /contact and Contact page renders Desktop light Pass
6 Runtime horizontal_overflow inspect rendered Terms page -> no document-level horizontal overflow Desktop light Pass
7 Evidence address_bar_video record full desktop/browser evidence with FFmpeg Windows desktop capture Pass
8 Task Sprint #1615 acceptance Terms content, TOC scroll-spy, anchors, back-to-top, and contact link verified TP Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Area Expected Actual Review
Route /term-of-service opens Terms page Dev page renders Terms of Use Pass
Legal content Real Terms content renders, not placeholder copy Document includes intro copy and sections sec-1 through sec-8 Pass
TOC 8 TOC entries mapped to 8 numbered sections Runtime state: tocCount: 8, sectionCount: 8 Pass
Scroll-spy Active TOC item updates while navigating sections Automated run clicked every TOC item and verified active state; screenshot captured sec-8 active Pass
Anchors TOC click jumps to matching content section Playwright verified each section is in viewport after click Pass
Back to top Control returns to top/hero Runtime click returned to top and screenshot captured hero again Pass
Contact callout Contact us opens /contact Runtime state: contactHref: "/contact"; click ended at https://dev.villume.com/contact with Contact Us heading Pass
Layout No horizontal overflow Runtime state: horizontalOverflow: false Pass

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Review
Browser navigation to https://dev.villume.com/term-of-service Navigation succeeded DOM rendered .villume-terms root, hero, TOC, sections, back-to-top, and contact callout rendered.
HEAD https://dev.villume.com/term-of-service Blocked by local TLS validation: SEC_E_CERT_EXPIRED N/A Dev certificate appears expired for curl/Schannel.
HEAD -k https://dev.villume.com/term-of-service 200 OK application/octet-stream / text/plain headers observed Route responded when TLS validation was bypassed, consistent with Playwright ignoreHTTPSErrors.

Evidence

Type File
Playwright spec qa_testing/tests/e2e/legal/issue_1615_terms_toc_all_sections.spec.ts
Evidence script qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1615-dev-flow.cjs
Initial Terms screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1615-terms-toc-initial-desktop.png
TOC all sections / section 8 screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1615-terms-toc-all-sections-sec8.png
Back-to-top screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1615-terms-back-to-top.png
Contact CTA screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1615-terms-contact-us.png
Address-bar video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1615-terms-toc-all-sections-address-bar.mp4
Video validation frame qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1615-video-frame-22s.png

Latest Runs

  • npx.cmd playwright test tests/e2e/legal/issue_1615_terms_toc_all_sections.spec.ts --config playwright.config.ts from qa_testing -> 1 passed (55.7s).
  • node qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1615-dev-flow.cjs outside the sandbox -> screenshots captured, address-bar MP4 captured, and runtime state verified.

Bug Notes

  • No functional blocker found for the Terms content, TOC anchors, scroll-spy active state, back-to-top, or Contact us CTA.
  • Address-bar MP4 was produced after running the evidence script outside the sandbox so FFmpeg gdigrab could capture the Windows desktop. Final video: 48.00s, 1920x1080, about 10 MB; frame validation confirms Chrome address bar and Terms page content are visible.
  • Direct curl without -k reports the dev TLS certificate as expired; Playwright testing used ignoreHTTPSErrors, and curl -k -I confirmed the route responds with 200 OK.

issues.display_title: Issue #1574: [QA] SEO/meta per page (Title/Meta services, SSR)
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: QA & rollout

SEO / meta per page (SSR).

Scope

  • Per-page <title> and <meta description> via Angular Title/Meta services, rendered server-side.
  • Port titles/descriptions from the new static pages.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. View-source each marketing route → correct <title> and meta description present in SSR HTML.
  2. Use a social/SEO preview tool → correct title/description shown.
  3. Confirm no duplicate/empty titles across pages.

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1574: SEO/meta per page (Title/Meta services, SSR)

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/seo/issue_1574_seo_meta_ssr.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Env: Dev https://dev.villume.com - viewer/no-login
Date: 2026-06-29

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White seo_config_routes marketing route list -> page-specific title and description exist in SEO config TP Pass
2 Gray ssr_html_title_description view-source/SSR HTML per route -> expected <title> and meta[name="description"] are present TP Pass
3 Black social_preview_meta_tags social preview crawlers read raw HTML -> og:* and twitter:* title/description match page SEO TP Pass
4 Task Sprint no_duplicate_empty_meta all marketing routes -> no duplicate/empty SSR title or description TP Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Flow: public marketing routes -> Angular SSR response -> Title/Meta service output in raw HTML

Area Expected Actual Review
SEO config Each target route has unique title and description Verified in src/app/shared/seo/page-seo.config.ts Pass
SSR HTML Raw response contains expected <title> and meta[name="description"] Verified for /, /about, /contact, /catalogue, /careers, /help, /tutorials, /privacy-cookie-policy, /term-of-service, /pricing, /search, /404 Pass
Social preview tags Raw response contains matching og:title, og:description, twitter:title, twitter:description Verified across all target routes Pass
Duplicate/empty check One non-empty title and one non-empty meta description per route; no duplicate values across target set Verified Pass

Bug Notes

  • None found for the confirmed SEO/meta SSR scope.

Evidence

Screenshots:

  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1574-home-meta-browser.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1574-contact-meta-browser.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1574-privacy-meta-browser.png

Video:

  • Not required for this task. The acceptance scope is SSR/source-level SEO meta validation, so evidence is dynamic: raw HTML assertions + targeted browser screenshots are sufficient.

npx.cmd playwright test tests/e2e/seo/issue_1574_seo_meta_ssr.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts

issues.display_title: Issue #1571: [QA] Responsive QA — all marketing pages
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: QA & rollout

Responsive QA across all redesigned marketing pages.

Scope

  • Verify /, /about, /catalogue, /contact + shared header/footer at mobile / tablet / desktop.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Test each page at 360px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px widths.
  2. Check: no horizontal scroll, no overlap, images scale, nav collapses, grids reflow.
  3. Test landscape mobile and a large 4K viewport.
  4. Log any breakpoint issues with screenshots.

Demo by Developer

issues.display_title: Issue #1570: [Integration] Home page (/) — carousel data, FAQ, CTAs
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: Home page / (integration)

Wire Home interactions and real data.

Scope

  • Exhibitions carousel bound to real featured-exhibition data; prev/next controls.
  • Reuse existing faq component for the FAQ accordion.
  • Wire all CTAs (Start building free → signup; Watch the demo → video/learn; Browse exhibitions → carousel/list).
  • Replace mock hero stats with real/config values; copy via ngx-translate.

Acceptance criteria

  • Carousel shows real exhibitions and scrolls; FAQ works; all CTAs route correctly.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Load / → carousel shows real featured exhibitions; prev/next cycles items.
  2. Click an exhibition "Enter" → opens the correct exhibition/viewer.
  3. Expand/collapse FAQ items.
  4. Click each CTA → correct destination/modal.
  5. Switch language → home copy translates.

Demo by Developer

issues.display_title: Issue #1566: [Integration] Templates/Catalogue (/catalogue) — real data, filters, CTAs
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: Templates page /catalogue (integration)

Wire the catalogue to real data and interactions.

Scope

  • Bind the grid to real catalogue/template data (replace hard-coded 8 cards).
  • Implement filter chips (All / Modifiable / Fixed) with live result count against real data.
  • Wire "Use template →" to the create-exhibition flow (/create-exhibition / /:username/create).
  • Favorite button → real behavior or hidden until supported.

Acceptance criteria

  • Real templates render; filters work and counts are accurate; CTA starts exhibition creation.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Load /catalogue → real templates appear (count matches backend).
  2. Click "Modifiable" → only modifiable templates show; count updates; "All" restores.
  3. Click "Use template" on a card → enters create-exhibition flow with that template.
  4. Favorite a template (if enabled) → state persists; otherwise control is hidden.
  5. Empty/error state → graceful message (no broken grid).

Demo by Developer

2026-06-05.14-26-27.mp4

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1566: Templates/Catalogue (/catalogue) - real data, filters, CTAs

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/catalogue/issue_1566_catalogue_integration.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Env: Dev https://dev.villume.com - viewer/no-login + existing logged-in user testergothru
Date: 2026-06-29
Overall Result: Passed with dev clarification

Dev Clarification

  • no filter: filter chips are not required for the accepted scope.
  • use template: Use template is acceptable when it routes the user into the create flow.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 Gray catalogue_real_templates guest loads /catalogue -> real room/template cards render and UI count matches backend data TP Pass
2 Black filter_chips_update_results original issue mentions filters, but dev clarified no filter N/A Skipped - accepted by dev clarification
3 Task Sprint use_template_new_user guest/new user clicks Use template -> auth/sign-up handoff appears before create flow TP Pass
4 Task Sprint use_template_existing_user existing logged-in user clicks Use template -> user is routed into create flow TP Pass
5 White favorite_hidden_until_supported favorite action is enabled and persists, or hidden when unsupported TP Pass
6 Black empty_catalogue_state backend returns empty template list -> graceful empty state appears without broken grid TP Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Flow: /catalogue -> GET https://app2-dev.villume.com/v1/room -> decrypted room/template cards -> Use template CTA -> auth/create flow

Area Expected Actual Review
Real catalogue data /catalogue renders real templates from backend and count matches rendered cards Backend /v1/room returned 200, encrypted data.cry with valid: true; app rendered 8 template cards and hero label 8 spaces & counting Pass
Filter chips Dev clarified filter is not required No All, Modifiable, or Fixed filter chips are visible on /catalogue; accepted because current scope is no filter Skipped / Accepted
Guest/new user Use template User must authenticate/sign up before entering create flow Guest click on Use template opens login modal; sign-up handoff opens Create your account form. Full registration was not submitted because sign-up is captcha-protected Pass
Existing logged-in user Use template Logged-in user should be routed into create flow Logged-in user is routed to /testergothru/create; dev clarified this Use template behavior is acceptable Pass
Favorite If enabled, favorite state persists; otherwise control is hidden No favorite/favourite control is exposed; only Preview gallery button is visible Pass
Empty/error state Empty backend response shows graceful message Mocked empty /v1/room response shows No templates available. and no broken card grid Pass

Notes

  • Previous failed assertions for filter chips and Step 2 handoff are no longer treated as bugs after dev clarification.
  • Filter scenario remains documented as skipped/accepted because dev explicitly confirmed no filter.
  • Existing logged-in Use template is treated as pass because it routes to /testergothru/create, and dev confirmed use template boleh.
  • Guest/new user behavior is still valid: Use template opens the auth/sign-up handoff before create flow.
  • Favorite behavior is acceptable under the conditional acceptance because the favorite control is currently hidden.

Evidence

Screenshots:

  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1566-catalogue-real-data-count.png
  • qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1566-filter-chips-missing-or-initial.png
